_README: Per-language pronunciation fixes. Each entry replaces a literal string before the text is sent to the model. Replacements should sound identical to a native speaker but be a spelling the model pronounces correctly. This file is hot-reloaded on every request — edit and save, no restart needed.
_to_test_hi: These are characters/conjuncts that sometimes need fixes in Hindi TTS engines. Test each one by typing a sample word and listening; if the model misreads, add a rule below.
क्ष  — कक्षा, परीक्षा, क्षमा, राक्षस  (should sound 'ksha', sometimes mispronounced 'ksa')
क़  — क़िला, काग़ज़  (q, like in Persian/Arabic loans)
English words mixed in Hindi text

hi.note: jña → gya. Sanskrit conjunct read literally as 'jiyan' by Supertonic; modern Hindi pronounces it as 'gya'. Covers ज्ञान/विज्ञान/अज्ञात/यज्ञ/संज्ञा/etc.
